title: Sanitation is hidden attrition
discovery: Water, waste, insects, and washing should degrade readiness over time if the player ignores them.
evidence: source_library/56_field_hygiene_and_sanitation.md:15-17 - water, waste, insect-borne disease, and field health are explicit concerns.
source_library/43_united_states_army_during_world_war_ii.md:15-17 - poor hygiene, trench foot, and combat fatigue shape daily life.
why: This makes field hygiene a slow combat system instead of a flavor layer.

variable.name: sanitation_state
variable.definition: Condition of water, waste, washing, and field cleanliness.

mechanic: Bivouac hygiene routine with disease risk accumulation.
pressure: Health erodes in the background if the unit cannot maintain basic living standards.
